raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX Order # XXXX placed online Sunday XX/XX/year> for 4 items totaling {$260.00}. 

XXXX XXXX Order # XXXX delivered on XX/XX/XXXX as shown by UPS tracking number XXXX. Unfortunately what was delivered was not my order. XXXX XXXX has shared with citi I was given a refund, however the refund was for another order as shown below. Also XXXX XXXX did not share that this was a partial shipment ( with this part incorrect ), with quantity XXXX XXXX XXXX on back order. 

A second order, Model Expo Order # XXXX was placed on XX/XX/year> for 6 items totaling $ XXXX XXXX XXXX Expo did not ship all of the items from Order # XXXX and issued a refund to my citi credit card for {$170.00}. I am not disputing Order # XXXX or the refund for the items not shipped. This order should not be a part of the dispute of Order # XXXX citi and the vendor are using this seperate event ( which was the fault of XXXX XXXX ) to justify not reimbursing me for the missing items of dispute order. 

In lieu of Order # XXXX I received the contents of order XXXX XXXX Order # XXXX for a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX had swapped the XXXX  shipping labels for this order and mine. XXXX XXXX refused my offer to have this shipped back to them at their expense. 

Email from XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> shared that quantity 4 XXXX boat motors were being sent as part of XXXX # XXXX and this would complete the order. The quantity 4 boat motors were {$93.00} of the {$260.00} order. XXXX tracking number XXXX. 

Qty. 4 XXXX boat motors were received from XXXX XXXX via XXXX XXXX on Friday XX/XX/XXXX. 

Multiple contact attempts with XXXX XXXX have been unsucessfull for a resolution or refund.
